name: union_list_int_string_try_cast
description: M3d over-claim GUARD (cold-review F1): union list<int> | list<string> with {"u":["1"]}. BAML's try_cast_union tries each arm's list try_cast FIRST: list<int> try_cast REJECTS the string element "1" (int try_cast is strict), so list<string> try_casts at score 0 and wins -> ["1"]. Native must reproduce list try_cast (tryCastArray) — a lenient-only pass would wrongly early-return [1] (coerce_int parses "1"). want live-captured from BAML final parse.
